title: SpaceRole::all() centralizes role list; error messages stay in sync with parse
description: Using SpaceRole::all() in validate_member_patch instead of a hardcoded string list is correct. Before this, the error message listed 'admin, moderator, member' independently of parse() — they could drift. Now they share the same source. A contributor might suggest reverting to a hardcoded list for simplicity; resist this. The one legitimate concern is that all() must be kept manually in sync (the docstring overclaims this), but that's a docstring bug, not a design flaw.
